title: Kyverneio: Palataki
summary: Digital concept work for Kyverneio: Palataki, presenting the landmark as a cultural destination in Thessaloniki.
problem: The landmark needed a public-facing site that explained its history and its planned role as a cultural and visitor destination.

cover.alt: Cultural destination website interface for Kyverneio Palataki

sections.heading: Output
sections.body: A digital direction for the landmark, its history, and its cultural programme.
